title: Notice of Change in Representation
description: Used when a party changes their legal representation — for example, hiring a lawyer, switching to a new lawyer, dismissing a lawyer to self-represent, or getting court permission to be represented by someone who is not a lawyer.

steps.title: Court & File Information
steps.description: Enter the court location and file number for your case.

fields.label: Court File Number
fields.hint: This is the number the court assigned to your case. It appears on your Application or any prior court documents.

fields.label: Name of Court
fields.hint: Write the full name of the court where your case is being heard.

fields.label: Court Location (City)
fields.hint: The city or municipality where the court office is located.

fields.label: Court Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 311 Jarvis Street, Toronto, ON M5B 2C4
fields.hint: Full street address of the courthouse.

steps.title: Applicant Information
steps.description: Enter the applicant's full name and contact details.

fields.label: Applicant — Full Legal Name
fields.hint: Use the full legal name exactly as it appears on the original Application.

fields.label: Applicant — Address for Service
fields.placeholder: Street & number, city, province, postal code

fields.label: Applicant's Current / Previous Lawyer (if any)
fields.placeholder: Lawyer's full name, firm, address, telephone, fax, email
fields.hint: Enter the current or previous lawyer's details if applicable. Leave blank if the applicant has always been self-represented.

steps.title: Respondent Information
steps.description: Enter the respondent's full name and contact details.

fields.label: Respondent — Address for Service
fields.placeholder: Street & number, city, province, postal code

fields.label: Respondent's Lawyer — Full Name & Address (if any)
fields.placeholder: Lawyer's full name, firm, address, telephone, fax, email
fields.hint: Leave blank if the respondent is self-represented.

steps.title: Children's Lawyer (if involved)
steps.description: If a Children's Lawyer has been appointed in your case, enter their information here.

fields.label: Is a Children's Lawyer involved in this case?

options.label: No — no Children's Lawyer is involved
Yes — a Children's Lawyer has been appointed

fields.hint: A Children's Lawyer may be appointed by the court to represent your child's interests separately.

fields.label: Children's Lawyer / Agent — Name, Address & Child Represented
fields.placeholder: Name & address of Children's Lawyer's agent for service (street & number, municipality, postal code, telephone & fax), and name of person represented.
fields.hint: Enter the Children's Lawyer's contact information and the name of the child they represent.

steps.title: Who is Filing This Notice
steps.description: Tell the court which party is changing their representation.

fields.label: My Full Legal Name
fields.hint: This notice is addressed to all parties and their lawyers.

steps.title: Nature of the Change
steps.description: Select the change in representation that applies to you. Choose only one.

fields.label: My change in representation is:

options.label: I have chosen to be represented by a lawyer (I was previously self-represented)
I have chosen a new lawyer (replacing my previous lawyer)
I have decided to act in person (I am dismissing my lawyer and will represent myself)
I have the court's permission to be represented by a person who is not a lawyer
I have the court's permission to appear in person at a child protection trial

fields.hint: If you are switching to self-representation from a lawyer, you must also serve this notice on your former lawyer.

steps.title: New Representation Details
steps.description: Provide the contact details for your new lawyer or representative, or your new address for service if acting in person.

fields.label: New Lawyer / Representative — Full Name
fields.hint: Enter the full name of your new lawyer or court-approved representative.

fields.label: New Lawyer / Representative — Address
fields.placeholder: Street & number, city, province, postal code

fields.label: New Lawyer / Representative — Fax Number (if any)
New Lawyer / Representative — Email Address (if any)
My Address for Service (if acting in person)
fields.placeholder: Street & number, city, province, postal code
fields.hint: If you are acting without a lawyer, documents will be served on you at this address. Provide a complete address — a PO Box alone is not sufficient.

fields.label: My Telephone Number (if acting in person)
My Email Address (if acting in person)
I have attached the new lawyer's consent to this notice
fields.hint: Rule 4 of the Family Law Rules requires you to attach the new lawyer's consent when you were previously self-represented and are now hiring a lawyer.

steps.title: Service Instructions
steps.description: Important steps you must complete after filing this notice.

fields.label: Important Service Requirements
fields.content:
After completing this form, you must:

1. Serve a copy of this notice on the lawyers for all other parties. If another party does not have a lawyer, serve it on that party directly.

2. If you had a lawyer who is no longer representing you because of this notice, you must also serve a copy on your former lawyer.

3. You may serve by any method in Rule 6 of the Family Law Rules (mail, courier, fax, or email).

4. After serving, file this notice with the court clerk together with proof of service (Form 6B: Affidavit of Service).

5. If a child protection case has been scheduled for trial, you must obtain the court's permission before removing your lawyer.

fields.label: I confirm I will serve this notice on all parties or their lawyers before filing with the court.
I will also serve this notice on my former lawyer (if applicable).
fields.hint: Check this if you had a lawyer who is being replaced or dismissed.

fields.label: I understand I must file Form 6B (Affidavit of Service) as proof that I served this notice.

steps.title: Signature & Date
steps.description: Sign and date this notice. You must sign it personally.

fields.label: Date of Signature
fields.hint: Enter today's date or the date you are signing this notice.

fields.label: I confirm that all information in this notice is true and correct, and I am signing this notice personally.
Hearth & Page Notice
fields.content: This notice was prepared using Hearth & Page. You must serve a copy on all parties (or their lawyers) and file it with the court together with Form 6B as proof of service. This document does not replace legal advice.
